name: Meenu Bhat
message: can package food on the weekends to serve the needy people
reflection: Thank you, Meenu Bhat. Your desire to join Project Ahsaaz stems from a beautiful, deep realization of human connection. By sharing your warmth and addressing hunger with dignity, you are helping to sow a seed of hope that will grow into a sanctuary of support for our community. We are honored to walk this path of true compassion together with you.
